Source: backend/src/backend/templates/documentation/model_documentation/mdd_template_schema_v5_ui.json
-->

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<link href="/styles.css" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="/assets/styles/template-schema.css" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.4.1.min.js" integrity="sha256-CSXorXvZcTkaix6Yvo6HppcZGetbYMGWSFlBw8HfCJo=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
    
    <script src="https://stackpath.bootstrapcdn.com/bootstrap/4.3.1/js/bootstrap.min.js" integrity="sha384-JjSmVgyd0p3pXB1rRibZUAYoIIy6OrQ6VrjIEaFf/nJGzIxFDsf4x0xIM+B07jRM" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
	
    
    <script src="schema_doc.min.js"></script>
    <meta charset="utf-8"/>
</head>
<body onload="anchorOnLoad();" id="root"><div class="template-schema-docs"><div class="text-right">
            <button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target=".collapse:not(.show)" aria-expanded="false">Expand all</button>
            <button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target=".collapse.show" aria-expanded="false">Collapse all</button>
        </div>

    <div class="breadcrumbs"></div> <span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: array</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Top-level documentation sections shown in the template editor.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

         <span class="badge badge-info no-additional">No Additional Items</span><h4>Each item of this array must be:</h4>
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body items-definition" id="items">
            

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">section</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: object</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>A section in the document tree.</p>
</span>

     <span class="badge badge-info no-additional">No Additional Properties</span>
        

        
        

        
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_id">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_id">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_id"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_id" onclick="setAnchor('#items_id')"><span class="property-name">id</span> <span class="badge badge-warning required-property">Required</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_id"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_id"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_id">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_id" onclick="anchorLink('items_id')">id</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Unique identifier for the section.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_title">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_title">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_title"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_title" onclick="setAnchor('#items_title')"><span class="property-name">title</span> <span class="badge badge-warning required-property">Required</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_title"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_title"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_title">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_title" onclick="anchorLink('items_title')">title</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Title of the section.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_description">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_description">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_description"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_description" onclick="setAnchor('#items_description')"><span class="property-name">description</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_description" onclick="anchorLink('items_description')">description</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Description of the section.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_order">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_order">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_order"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_order" onclick="setAnchor('#items_order')"><span class="property-name">order</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_order"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_order"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_order">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_order" onclick="anchorLink('items_order')">order</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: integer</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Order of the section in the navigation menu. By default sections are ordered alphabetically. If order is specified, sections will be ordered by the order value, and then alphabetically.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_default_text">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_default_text">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_default_text"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_default_text" onclick="setAnchor('#items_default_text')"><span class="property-name">default_text</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_default_text"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_default_text"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_default_text">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"

        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_default_text" onclick="anchorLink('items_default_text')">default_text</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Default text for the section. If set, a metadata content row will be created with this text when installing the template on a given project.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_index_only">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_index_only">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_index_only"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_index_only" onclick="setAnchor('#items_index_only')"><span class="property-name">index_only</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_index_only"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_index_only"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_index_only">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"

        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_index_only" onclick="anchorLink('items_index_only')">index_only</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: boolean</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>If true, the section will be displayed in the navigation menu, but it will not be accessible via direct link.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_condensed">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_condensed">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_condensed"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_condensed" onclick="setAnchor('#items_condensed')"><span class="property-name">condensed</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_condensed"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_condensed"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_condensed">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"

                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_condensed" onclick="anchorLink('items_condensed')">condensed</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: boolean</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>If true, the section will condense all of its subsections into a single section.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_guidelines">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_guidelines">
            <h2 class="mb-0">

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_guidelines" onclick="anchorLink('items_guidelines')">guidelines</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: array of string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Documentation or validation guidelines for the section.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

         <span class="badge badge-info no-additional">No Additional Items</span><h4>Each item of this array must be:</h4>
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body items-definition" id="items_guidelines_items">
            

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_guidelines_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_guidelines_items')">guidelines items</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>

        

        
        

        
        </div>
    </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_contents" onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents')"><span class="property-name">contents</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_contents"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_contents"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_contents">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents')">contents</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: array</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Contents to be displayed on the section.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

         <span class="badge badge-info no-additional">No Additional Items</span><h4>Each item of this array must be:</h4>
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body items-definition" id="items_contents_items">
            

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents')">contents</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items')">section_contents</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: object</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Single content block rendered within a section.</p>
</span>

    
        

        
        

        
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents_items_content_type">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents_items_content_type">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents_items_content_type"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_contents_items_content_type" onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_content_type')"><span class="property-name">content_type</span> <span class="badge badge-warning required-property">Required</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_contents_items_content_type"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_contents_items_content_type"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_contents_items_content_type">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents')">contents</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items')">contents items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_type" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_type')">content_type</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: enum (of string)</span> <span class="badge badge-success default-value">Default: "text"</span><br/>
<div class="enum-value" id="items_contents_items_content_type_enum">
            <h4>Must be one of:</h4>
            <ul class="list-group"><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"text"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"metadata_text"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"dynamic"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"metric"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"test"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"guideline"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"assessment_summary"</li><li class="list-group-item enum-item">"unit_metric"</li></ul>
            </div>
        

        
        

        <br/>
<div class="badge badge-secondary">Examples:</div>
<br/><div id="items_contents_items_content_type_ex1" class="jumbotron examples"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div><div id="items_contents_items_content_type_ex2" class="jumbotron examples"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="s2">&quot;test&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents_items_content_id">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents_items_content_id">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents_items_content_id"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_contents_items_content_id" onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_content_id')"><span class="property-name">content_id</span> <span class="badge badge-warning required-property">Required</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_contents_items_content_id"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_contents_items_content_id"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_contents_items_content_id">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"

        </svg>

    <a href="#items_contents" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents')">contents</a>

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items')">contents items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_id" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_id')">content_id</a></div><br/>
<span class="description"><p>ID of the content to be displayed for the given content type.</p>
</span><div class="one-of-value" id="items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf"><h2 class="handle">
  <label>One of</label>
</h2><ul class="nav nav-tabs" id="tabsitems_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_oneOf" role="tablist"><li class="nav-item">
            <a class="nav-link active oneOf-option"
               id="items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i0" data-toggle="tab" href="#tab-pane_items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i0" role="tab"
               onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i0')"
            >Option 1</a>
        </li><li class="nav-item">
            <a class="nav-link oneOf-option"
               id="items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1" data-toggle="tab" href="#tab-pane_items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1" role="tab"
               onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1')"
            >Option 2</a>
        </li></ul>

    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1')">item 1</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: array of string</span><br/>

        

        
        

         <span class="badge badge-info no-additional">No Additional Items</span><h4>Each item of this array must be:</h4>
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body items-definition" id="items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1_items">
            

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>

        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents')">contents</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

                fill-rule="evenodd"

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items')">contents items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_id" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_id')">content_id</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf')">oneOf</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1')">item 1</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1_items')">item 1 items</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>

        

        
        

        
        </div>
    </div><br/>
<div class="badge badge-secondary">Example:</div>
<br/><div id="items_contents_items_content_id_oneOf_i1_ex1" class="jumbotron examples"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;sample_text&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;section_intro&quot;</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
        </div></div></div>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents_items_options">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents_items_options">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents_items_options"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_contents_items_options" onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_options')"><span class="property-name">options</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_contents_items_options"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_contents_items_options"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_contents_items_options">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents')">contents</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items')">contents items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_options" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_options')">options</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: object</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Options for the content block.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        <br/>
<div class="badge badge-secondary">Examples:</div>
<br/><div id="items_contents_items_options_ex1" class="jumbotron examples"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;default_text&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;This is a sample text block.&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div><div id="items_contents_items_options_ex2" class="jumbotron examples"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;metric_id&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;metric_1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Custom Title for Metric 1&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div><div id="items_contents_items_options_ex3" class="jumbotron examples"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;test_id&quot;</span><span class="o">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;adf_test&quot;</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents_items_options_default_text">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents_items_options_default_text">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents_items_options_default_text"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_contents_items_options_default_text" onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_options_default_text')"><span class="property-name">default_text</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_contents_items_options_default_text"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_contents_items_options_default_text"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_contents_items_options_default_text">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_options" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_options')">options</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_contents_items_options_default_text" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_options_default_text')">default_text</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Default text for the content block. Only applicable for text content blocks.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents_items_options_title">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents_items_options_title">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents_items_options_title"

    <a href="#items_contents_items_options_title" onclick="anchorLink('items_contents_items_options_title')">title</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: string</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Title of the content block. Only applicable for metric and test content blocks.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

        
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_contents_items_additionalProperties">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_contents_items_additionalProperties">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_contents_items_additionalProperties"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_contents_items_additionalProperties" onclick="setAnchor('#items_contents_items_additionalProperties')"><em><span class="property-name">Additional Properties</span></em></button>

        <div id="items_contents_items_additionalProperties"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_contents_items_additionalProperties"

<div class="accordion" id="accordionitems_sections">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header" id="headingitems_sections">
            <h2 class="mb-0">
                <button class="btn btn-link property-name-button" type="button" data-toggle="collapse" data-target="#items_sections"
                        aria-expanded="" aria-controls="items_sections" onclick="setAnchor('#items_sections')"><span class="property-name">sections</span></button>
            </h2>
        </div>

        <div id="items_sections"
             class="collapse property-definition-div" aria-labelledby="headingitems_sections"
             data-parent="#accordionitems_sections">
            <div class="card-body pl-5">

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_sections" onclick="anchorLink('items_sections')">sections</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: array</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>Nested child sections.</p>
</span>
        

        
        

         <span class="badge badge-info no-additional">No Additional Items</span><h4>Each item of this array must be:</h4>
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body items-definition" id="items_sections_items">
            

    <div class="breadcrumbs">root
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')">root items</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_sections" onclick="anchorLink('items_sections')">sections</a>
        <svg width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path
                fill-rule="evenodd"
                d="M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h5.793L8.146 5.354a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.708-.708L10.293 8.5H4.5A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8z"
            />
        </svg>
    <a href="#items_sections_items" onclick="anchorLink('items_sections_items')">section</a></div><span class="badge badge-dark value-type">Type: object</span><br/>
<span class="description"><p>A section in the document tree.</p>
</span><a href="#items" onclick="anchorLink('items')" class="ref-link">Same definition as items</a>
        </div>
    </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <footer>
        <p class="generated-by-footer">Generated using <a href="https://github.com/coveooss/json-schema-for-humans">json-schema-for-humans</a> on 2026-07-03 at 17:24:48 -0700</p>
    </footer></div></body>
</html>
```
